caption: The video captures a bustling scene outside a building, likely a train station or transportation hub, during the Lunar New Year celebrations. People are seen walking with their luggage, some pulling large suitcases and others carrying bags, indicating they might be traveling for the holiday. The bright sunlight casts long shadows, suggesting it is either early morning or late afternoon. The individuals are dressed warmly, hinting at cold weather conditions. The atmosphere is lively yet orderly, with people moving purposefully towards their destinations. The text overlay mentions "And some celebrations of the Lunar New Year," setting the context for the scene. The overall mood conveys a sense of anticipation and movement as people prepare to celebrate the festive occasion.
